title: the cloud Photos
drDigitalIntro: the cloud Photos syncs your photos across all your devices — computer, phone, tablet. When you take a photo on your phone, it appears in Photos on your computer automatically. You get 5GB free; if you need more, subscribe to the cloud+. the cloud also backs up your photos so if you lose your computer, your photos are safe in the cloud.

playgroundTask.question: With the cloud Photos turned on, what happens when you take a photo on your phone?

options.text: It saves only on your phone
It automatically appears on all your devices
You have to manually transfer it to your computer

drDigitalSuccess: the cloud Photos is seamless sync — snap a photo on your phone, it's on your computer in seconds.
drDigitalHint: the cloud connects all your devices. With Photos enabled, your photo library is one shared library across all of them.
